name: Aggretsuko RPG
description:
Welcome to Japan and the world of Aggretsuko
Aggretsuko was made and written by Rarecho and licensed by Netflix in this world everyone is a different animals they are smart can walk and live a daily life like the humans in our world. The main protagonist live in Japan she Retsuko a red panda annd she went by singing some death metal and she friend with Fenneko and Haida they work at Carrier Man Trading Co., Ltd in the financial district. Be ready to have a nice roleplay in this world. There no humans at all so if you want go ahead try
creator: Nightmare XI
